brand.name: Ruby Travel
brand.tagline: Da Nang travel tickets — QR via email

auth.loginDemoDesc: This is a demo login to show the avatar in the header. Once Supabase Auth is ready, we’ll switch to real authentication.
auth.name: Name

hero.pill: MVP in progress — QR first, QR via email
hero.desc: Pick a date (from today onward) and choose experiences like Ba Na Hills, Vinpearl, Hoi An Memories, Nui Than Tai or a Han River cruise. Pay with QR and receive a QR ticket via email.
hero.miniPill: Pay with QR • Receive QR via email

fast.title: Fast booking
fast.desc: Pick a date, choose tickets, pay with QR. No login needed.

qr.title: QR via email
qr.desc: After successful payment, your QR ticket is sent to email automatically.

pricing.title: Flexible pricing
pricing.desc: Base/promo pricing by events, with Central Vietnam option.

agent.title: Agents
agent.desc: Sign up → admin approval → top up wallet → issue tickets faster.

experiences.title: Featured experiences
experiences.desc: Generic demo content. We’ll update with real info/prices later.

how.title: How it works
how.desc: A minimal flow to get your tickets fast.
how.ctaDesc: Choose a date, enter details, pay with QR, get QR.

needAccount.q: Do I need an account to buy tickets?
needAccount.a: No. Email + phone is enough to receive the QR ticket.

chooseDate.q: How do I choose a travel date?
chooseDate.a: Select a date from today onward. Some tickets may be limited by events/programs.

payment.a: MVP integrates QR first. MoMo can be added later if needed.

agent.a: Agents need admin approval and a prepaid wallet. Tickets are issued quickly after wallet deduction.

affiliate.title: Affiliate
affiliate.desc: Create an account → apply as affiliate → admin approval → (agents) top up wallet to issue tickets faster.

sell.title: For ticket sellers
sell.desc: A dedicated page for orders & sales tracking (coming soon).

wallet.title: Agent wallet
wallet.desc: Prepaid wallet for agents; wallet is deducted when issuing tickets (MVP).
wallet.note: Note: we’ll connect Supabase + QR topup later.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: No login needed. Enter details and pay with QR.

form.title: Ticket details
form.qtyDesc: Enter quantities by passenger type (if applicable)
form.centralDesc: Tick if eligible for Central Vietnam pricing/promo
form.notePlaceholder: Example: invoice request, arrival time notes...

bana.name: Ba Na Hills
bana.tagline: Cable car • Golden Bridge • theme park
